description: At Afterlife, Jiaying guides Skye in her training, teaching her to sense and control frequencies. Skye is initially apprehensive about her powers, but under Jiaying’s encouragement she uses them to trigger an avalanche, impressing both her and Jiaying. The bond between Jiaying and Skye deepens, marking a turning point for Skye’s acceptance of her abilities.

transcript.line: I want to know where you're from. Did you make friends there?
At S.H.I.E.L.D.? Yeah. They're like family. Or they were.
Until you changed? They sent agents after you.
I don't know what happened. I know I impaled a guy.
Who shot at you.
No. I lost control.
Do you understand your gift?
I make things shake?

Well, not really. Everything's shaking already, vibrating at its own natural frequency. This stone, the wood in the trees... I believe you can learn to sense those frequencies around you and resonate with them so that not everything is shaking, only what you choose.
Sense a frequency. How do I do that?
I don't know. I'm not the one with the gift. I just work here.
You think I can hear the stone?
Whoa. You've got to be kidding me.
Can you hear it?
No, not the stone. The mountain. It's the loudest thing here.
Well, now take that frequency and see if you can amplify it.
The last time I did something like this, a lot of people got hurt.
You can't hurt the mountain, and you're not gonna hurt me. Don't be afraid.
I moved a mountain.
Remember that feeling. It's not something to be afraid of.
